title: Modern Countertops: A Comprehensive Guide to Materials, Sustainability, and Digital Selection

generationOptions.description: A clear comparison of modern countertop materials and their role in sustainable design.
generationOptions.documentDirective: Outline the key differences between natural granite and engineered quartz for new learners. The guide should explain market trends, such as the shift toward low-silica surfaces and recycled materials like Hybriq+ technology, while highlighting why digital visualisation is becoming essential for consumers to choose the right material for their homes.
